name: invest-02-slow-query-triage
initialPrompt: Our checkout flow is timing out in production — p99 is 8 s and we're getting support tickets. The database team says it's a slow query but nobody has tracked it down yet. I need a plan to: identify which exact queries are slow and why, apply targeted fixes (indexes, query rewrites, or schema changes), and set up ongoing query performance monitoring so we catch this earlier next time.

cannedAuthorResponse.title: PostgreSQL slow query triage and fix for checkout flow

blocks.text: Reduce checkout p99 latency from 8 s to under 500 ms by fixing slow PostgreSQL queries

blocks.title: Enable pg_stat_statements and identify top-10 slowest queries
acceptance: top-10 queries by total_time exported to spreadsheet

blocks.title: Run EXPLAIN ANALYZE on each slow query to find missing indexes
acceptance: execution plan documented for each query
Seq Scans on large tables identified

blocks.title: Add missing indexes using CONCURRENTLY to avoid table locks
acceptance: EXPLAIN plan shows Index Scan replacing Seq Scan

blocks.question: For queries that cannot be fixed with an index alone, rewrite the query or change schema?

options.label: Schema change (add materialized column or view)

blocks.description: Adding indexes on hot tables causes lock contention even with CONCURRENTLY
blocks.mitigation: Schedule index creation during lowest traffic window; monitor pg_locks

blocks.question: Should checkout reads be routed to a read replica to offload the primary?

idChangedButCorresponding.note: Same intent (whether to route reads to a replica) but renamed during revise. AC-13 re-anchoring must map a comment on oq-read-replica to oq-replica-routing.

decoy.note: Genuinely new block. Shares surface tokens 'pg_stat_statements' and 'monitoring' with task-enable-pgss, making it a trap. A comment on task-enable-pgss must stay on task-enable-pgss, not mis-attach here.

notes: Renumbering pressure: task-prod-replica-baseline inserted near top (positional shift for everything after); task-monitoring-dashboard appended as genuinely new; oq-read-replica renamed to oq-replica-routing. Naive positional scheme loses obj/task-enable alignment. expectedPreservedIds excludes the renamed open-question and the two new tasks.
